'''Bantha Burrows''' was a deep-[[Desert/Legends|desert]] [[canyon]] maze located on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. It consisted of thousands of huge caves, possibly used by [[Bantha/Legends|banthas]] retreating from dangerous [[Sandstorm/Legends|sandstorms]].<ref name="TG" />

In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] sought shelter there from a large sandstorm.<ref name="TG" />
